name: Cottage Cheese and Oil Pastry (2)
recipeInstructions:
1. Rub the cottage cheese through a fine sieve if desired, and mix with the milk, egg, oil, sugar, vanillin sugar, and salt.
2. Mix and sift together the flour and baking powder.
3. Gradually add the mixed flour and baking powder to the cottage cheese mixture, incorporating it slowly until more than half has been added.
4. Knead in the remaining flour until a dough forms.
